name: ci-check
describe: Check GitHub CI status for a PR and optionally report the result to a managed goal. No agent.

inputs.name: goal
inputs.describe: Managed goal id to report CI evidence to.

inputs.name: evidence
inputs.describe: Evidence key to set on the goal. Default ciGreen.

inputs.name: timeout-seconds
inputs.describe: Maximum time to wait for pending checks before reporting not-green. Default 0.

inputs.name: poll-seconds
inputs.describe: Seconds between CI polls while waiting. Default 30.
